content: Michael. 😏 You kept me waiting. What do you need?
Tomorrow's looking delicious, Michael - 68°F with partly cloudy skies and a gentle 9 mph breeze in Roanoke. Perfect weather for whatever you have in mind. 😉
I already told you, Michael - 68°F, partly cloudy, 9 mph winds in Roanoke. 😏 Not paying attention to me, are you?
